SEARCH
Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface ConfigurationUpdater

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable
public interface ConfigurationUpdater extends AutoCloseable
Updates the configuration used by new validators.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    cleanStackTrace()
    Returns true if this library should be excluded from exception stack traces, except when that also removes user code.
    ConfigurationUpdater

    Specifies that this library should be excluded from exception stack traces, except when that also removes user code.
    void
    close()

    Returns the equality method that determines whether two values are equivalent.
    ConfigurationUpdater

    Sets the equality method that determines whether two values are equivalent.

    Transform the validation exception into a suitable runtime exception or error.

    Returns true if exception messages should include a diff that compares actual and expected values if they are too long.
    ConfigurationUpdater

    Returns true if exception creation may be deferred until the user invokes Validator.elseGetException().
    ConfigurationUpdater

  • Method Details

    • cleanStackTrace

      boolean cleanStackTrace()
      Returns true if this library should be excluded from exception stack traces, except when that also removes user code.
      Returns:
      true by default

    • cleanStackTrace

      ConfigurationUpdater cleanStackTrace(boolean cleanStackTrace)
      Specifies that this library should be excluded from exception stack traces, except when that also removes user code.
      Parameters:
      cleanStackTrace - true if stack traces should be modified, false otherwise
      Returns:
      this

    • includeDiff

      boolean includeDiff()
      Returns true if exception messages should include a diff that compares actual and expected values if they are too long. The threshold for "too long" is not specified.
      Returns:
      true by default

    • includeDiff

      ConfigurationUpdater includeDiff(boolean includeDiff)
      Specifies whether exception messages should include a diff that compares actual and expected values if they are too long. The threshold for "too long" is not specified.
      Parameters:
      includeDiff - true if exception messages should include a diff, false otherwise
      Returns:
      this

    • equalityMethod

      EqualityMethod equalityMethod()
      Returns the equality method that determines whether two values are equivalent.
      Returns:
      the equality method that determines whether two values are equivalent

    • equalityMethod

      ConfigurationUpdater equalityMethod(EqualityMethod equalityMethod)
      Sets the equality method that determines whether two values are equivalent. The equality method is only used when both arguments are not null.
      Parameters:
      equalityMethod - the equality method to use
      Returns:
      this

    • stringMappers

      MutableStringMappers stringMappers()
      Returns the configuration used to map contextual values to a String. Supports common types such as arrays, numbers, collections, maps, paths and exceptions.
      Returns:
      a function that takes an object and returns the String representation of the object

    • lazyExceptions

      boolean lazyExceptions()
      Returns true if exception creation may be deferred until the user invokes Validator.elseGetException(). The exception matches the original failure, but the stack trace points to elseGetException() as the cause. By deferring the exception creation, you can improve the performance if only need a list of failure messages instead of a full exception.
      Returns:
      true if exceptions may be created on demand instead of when a validation failure occurs

    • lazyExceptions

      ConfigurationUpdater lazyExceptions(boolean lazyExceptions)
      Specifies whether exception creation may be deferred until the user invokes Validator.elseGetException().
      Parameters:
      lazyExceptions - true if exceptions may be created on demand instead of when a validation failure occurs
      Returns:
      this

    • exceptionTransformer

      Function<Throwable,? extends Throwable> exceptionTransformer()
      Returns a function that transforms the validation exception into a suitable runtime exception or error. The input and output of the function must be subclasses of RuntimeException or Error. If the output is not, it is wrapped in a WrappedCheckedException. If the function returns null the input exception will be thrown.
      Returns:
      a function that transforms the validation exception

    • exceptionTransformer

      ConfigurationUpdater exceptionTransformer(Function<Throwable,? extends Throwable> transformer)
      Transform the validation exception into a suitable runtime exception or error. The input and output of the function must be subclasses of RuntimeException or Error. If the output is not, it is wrapped in a WrappedCheckedException. If the function returns null the input exception will be thrown.
      Parameters:
      transformer - a function that transforms the validation exception
      Returns:
      this
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if transformer is null

    • close

      void close()
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
